page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance exhibits moderate performance characteristics. While its single-core and multi-core CPU performance under stress-ng falls into the lower tiers, its memory subsystem delivers average performance, with cached small-block read bandwidth reaching 400.15 GB/sec. Uncached large-block read and write bandwidths are weaker, measuring 30.8 GB/sec and 15.87 GB/sec respectively. Passmark CPU and memory scores align with average mid-tier performance, as do its database operations and static web serving throughput of 6.77 GB/sec.

Given its high memory density relative to compute resources, the ecs.r6a.2xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require substantial memory capacity without demanding extreme CPU performance. The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which is constrained by the 2 Gbps baseline network speed. This hardware profile is best suited for memory-intensive workloads such as caching layers, Redis deployments, and medium-sized database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Network performance is anchored by a 2 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates average performance for cached memory bandwidth, Passmark CPU tests, and Redis SET operations, alongside weaker uncached memory write speeds and stress-ng CPU metrics. This instance offers a balanced, cost-efficient profile for memory-heavy applications that do not require intensive raw compute, making it highly suited for caching layers, in-memory databases like Redis, and general database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 8 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps baseline network speed, designed for database operations and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server with dedicated AMD EPYC cores and high RAM density for caching and database workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor with 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage or GPU accelerators included

Suited for in-memory caching, databases, and memory-intensive tasks
